data.title: XCN defies Bitcoin and Ethereum slump with 97% spike
data.description:
Onyxcoin (XCN) has risen 97% in the past 24 hours as altcoins enjoy massive buying pressure. The XCN price bucks the trend that saw Bitcoin and Ethereum down after notable gains a day earlier. Tariffs and other market conditions weigh on investor sentiment
source: https://coinjournal.net/news/xcn-defies-bitcoin-and-ethereum-slump-with-97-spike/

data.title: Bitcoin traders’ sentiment shift points to next step in BTC halving cycle
data.description:
Bitcoin’s (BTC) four-year cycle, anchored around its halving events, is widely recognized as a key factor in BTC’s year-over-year price growth. Within this larger framework, traders have come to expect distinct phases: accumulation, parabolic rallies, and eventual crashes. Throughout the four-year period, shorter-duration cycles also emerge, often driven by shifts in market sentiment and the behavior of long- and short-term holders. These cycles, shaped by the psychological patterns of market participants, can provide insights into Bitcoin’s next moves
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/bitcoin-traders-sentiment-shift-points-to-next-step-in-btc-halving-cycle?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Cardano founder hints at surprising airdrop to 37M users
data.description:
Cardano founder Charles Hoskinson said that the upcoming airdrop of the Midnight sidechain will target 37 million users across eight blockchains.
source: https://www.thestreet.com/crypto/innovation/cardano-founder-hints-at-midnight-airdrop-to-37m-users-at-paris-event

data.title: Justin Sun, Rand Paul, Brock Pierce and Karnika Yashwant join forces to power Liberland
data.description:
Liberland, a sovereign state located between Croatia and Serbia, is preparing to celebrate its 10th anniversary this weekend. The blockchain-based nation has already chosen leaders for its Congress ahead of building the next phase of its decentralization. Tron founder and Prime Minister of Liberland, Justin Sun, has publicly committed to supporting the nation’s infrastructure. He […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/justin-sun-rand-paul-brock-pierce-and-karnika-yashwant-join-forces-to-power-liberland/

data.title: Sui Network Dominates Blockchain Landscape In Stablecoin Inflows
data.description:
Sui network has emerged as one of the biggest winners in the last 22 hours as the market experienced a pivot in favor of liquidity inflows. On-chain data also signaled a surge in spot inflows into the SUI crypto.
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/04/10/sui-network-dominates-blockchain-landscape-in-stablecoin-inflows/

data.description:
Fed's Lorie Logan highlights the need to curb tariff-driven inflation in a crucial update.
source: https://coincu.com/331445-fed-inflation-tariff-impact

data.title: Bitcoin and stocks crash again as traders cash out post-tariff rally
data.description:
Bitcoin dropped more than 3% to $79,465. 09 on Thursday as financial markets fell apart again, with traders dumping both crypto and stocks after a one-day rally sparked by a temporary tariff pause. According to data from Bloomberg, cryptocurrencies moved in lockstep with U. S. equities, as fears around President Donald Trump’s trade policies hit markets across […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/bitcoin-stocks-drop-as-traders-cash-out/

data.title: New Hampshire House Approves Bitcoin Reserve Bill
data.description: According to Odaily, the New Hampshire House of Representatives has passed a bill concerning Bitcoin reserves. This legislative move marks a significant step in the state's approach to cryptocurrency regulation and adoption. The bill's approval reflects growing interest and recognition of digital currencies within governmental frameworks.

data.title: New Hampshire House Passes Bitcoin Reserve Bill
data.description: New Hampshire House of Representatives passes Bitcoin Reserve Act. (Bitcoin Magazine)
